prerequisites: A Pipedrive account with API access enabled for your user. If the API option is not visible in Settings, an account admin must enable API access for company users first.
A personal API token for the user and company whose data you want to replicate. The token is tied to a single user and grants access to all of that user's data.
A replication start date (replication_start_date) marking the earliest point from which records should be synced.

authMethods.name: API token
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a personal Pipedrive API token supplied in the api_token field. Each user has one active token per company, tied to that user's permissions and data. Pipedrive validates every request against this token; it can be sent in the x-api-token request header (or, on the v1 API, as the api_token query parameter).

setupSteps.title: Enable API access (if needed)
setupSteps.body: Confirm your Pipedrive plan and user have API access enabled. If the API section does not appear in Settings, have a company admin enable API access for company users before continuing.

setupSteps.title: Find your personal API token
setupSteps.body: In the Pipedrive web app, open the account menu (top right) and go to Company settings > Personal preferences > API, or visit https://app.pipedrive.com/settings/api directly. Copy the API token shown there. Keep it secret and treat it like a password, since it grants access to all of your data.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_token
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied token into the connector's required api_token field. Note that only one token is active per user at a time, so regenerating it will break other integrations that rely on the old token.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required replication_start_date to the earliest date from which records should be replicated. Records dated before this point are excluded from the sync.

sources.title: How to find the API token - Pipedrive
How can I find my personal API key? - Pipedrive Knowledge Base
